title: danny-avila/LibreChat
abstract: danny-avila/LibreChat stands out in the LLM landscape with strong reasoning, long context windows, and tool-calling support. Developer adoption speaks for itself.
abstract_zh: 来个福利！LibreChat **就像你的私人秘书**，写周报时再也不怕加班狗；调Bug时能帮你快速定位问题，效率提升到飞起！相比其他工具，它不仅智能还幽默，简直就是你工作中不可或缺的小伙伴。快来试试吧！🚀
